mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_ATTACHMENT( ID, UPLOADER_USER_ID, POST_ID, TASK_ID, FILE_NAME, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_URL, CREATED_AT ) VALUES( #{id}, #{uploaderUserId}, #{postId}, #{taskId}, #{fileName}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_ATTACHMENT SET UPLOADER_USER_ID = #{uploaderUserId}, POST_ID = #{postId}, TASK_ID = #{taskId}, FILE_NAME = #{fileName}, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME = #{originalFileName}, FILE_URL = #{fileUrl}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
